AddOnInstructionDefinition.Name: AOI_RFID
AddOnInstructionDefinition.Description: RFID AOI for EMS RFID Readers Gateway: GWY-01-IND-01 Node: C0405-485-01
AddOnInstructionDefinition.RevisionNote: v1.5.0 - Minor Revision code updates -> Created Prescan routine to hold tag constants -> Removed unused tags -> Removed unused rungs -> Minor Fault bug fix with BTD command usage -> Added clear read tags on new command
AddOnInstructionDefinition.AdditionalHelpText: EMS Reader AOI for BSC CRM - Clonmel, Ireland; Dorado, Puerto Rico; St. Paul, Minnesota

Parameter.Name: EnableIn
Parameter.Description: Enable Input - System Defined Parameter

Parameter.Name: EnableOut
Parameter.Description: Enable Output - System Defined Parameter

Parameter.Name: cfg_node
Parameter.Description: Node number being commanded.

Parameter.Name: cfg_tag_total_bytes
Parameter.Description: Total bytes on tags being used.

Parameter.Name: cmd_command
Parameter.Description: Command value = Read = 1, Write = 2, Fill = 3, Empty Check = 4, TagID =5, Tag Presence = 6, Controller Status= 7, Read Entire Tag = 8

Parameter.Name: cmd_reset
Parameter.Description: Reset Sequencing

Parameter.Name: cmd_clear_fault
Parameter.Description: Clear fault.

Parameter.Name: sts_tagid
Parameter.Description: TagID returned from the RFID tag.

Parameter.Name: cfg_read
Parameter.Description: Read configuration - RFID_Cft UDT

Parameter.Name: sts_read_return
Parameter.Description: Data returned from the tag. RFID_Cfg Datatype.

Parameter.Name: cfg_write
Parameter.Description: Write configuration - RFID_Cfg UDT

Parameter.Name: ctrl_node_write
Parameter.Description: Node specific write tag from the Gateway.

Parameter.Name: ctrl_node_read
Parameter.Description: Node specific read tag from the Gateway.

Parameter.Name: sts_complete
Parameter.Description: Command completed bit.

Parameter.Name: sts_command_ip
Parameter.Description: Current command being executed in the AOI.

Parameter.Name: sts_fault_code
Parameter.Description: Fault status word. If a fault exists, the value will correspond to a fault.

Parameter.Name: sts_fault
Parameter.Description: Fault status bit.

Parameter.Name: sts_tag_present
Parameter.Description: Tag presence status. If enabled a 1 will indicate that a tag is present and 0 will indicate no tag present.

Parameter.Name: sts_seq_step
Parameter.Description: Current step in the AOI sequencing.

Parameter.Name: node_cmd_latch
Parameter.Description: Command issued latch.

Parameter.Name: node_cmd_write
Parameter.Description: Write command bit

Parameter.Name: node_response_ok
Parameter.Description: Node response is OK.

Parameter.Name: node_response_error
Parameter.Description: No response error bit.

Parameter.Name: cycle_count1
Parameter.Description: Cycle counter.

Parameter.Name: max_array_elem_write
Parameter.Description: Maximum element to write. Compared with cycle count to stop r/w actions.

Parameter.Name: operation
Parameter.Description: Data convert operation (INT to SINT or SINT to INT)

Parameter.Name: node_array_length
Parameter.Description: INT array length. Used to convert data sent to/received from the RFID tags.

Parameter.Name: node_convert_index1
Parameter.Description: INT tag index used during data convert INT to SINT

Parameter.Name: node_convert_index2
Parameter.Description: SINT tag index used during data convert INT to SINT

Parameter.Name: node_write_txfr_delay
Parameter.Description: Bit used to delay write sequencing.

Parameter.Name: sts_node_healthy
Parameter.Description: Node controller healty status bit (on = healthy)

Parameter.Name: sts_ip
Parameter.Description: Command is in progress flag

LocalTag.Name: node_tempdata
LocalTag.Description: Data sent to/received from the Gateway in the form of INT

LocalTag.Name: r_w_f_delay_tmr
LocalTag.Description: Startup delay timer

LocalTag.Name: node_no_response
LocalTag.Description: No response bit

LocalTag.Name: node_notification
LocalTag.Description: Notification of data recieved from Gateway.

LocalTag.Name: node_cmd_read
LocalTag.Description: Read command bit

LocalTag.Name: node_cmd_fill
LocalTag.Description: Fill command bit

LocalTag.Name: node_cmd_tagid
LocalTag.Description: TagID command bit

LocalTag.Name: node_response_tmr
LocalTag.Description: Node response timer.

LocalTag.Name: max_array_elem_read
LocalTag.Description: How many cycles worth of data to read.

LocalTag.Name: blank_chk_index
LocalTag.Description: Index used for checking if a tag is blank.

LocalTag.Name: cfg_calc_full_strings
LocalTag.Description: Calculated 82 character strings on tag.

LocalTag.Name: cfg_calc_rem_bytes
LocalTag.Description: Remaining bytes to be used after full 188 byte blocks are used

LocalTag.Name: k_string_characters
LocalTag.Description: DO NOT CHANGE DATA IN THIS TAG Various string constants used.

LocalTag.Name: cmd_data_read
LocalTag.Description: DO NOT CHANGE DATA IN THIS TAG Read command

LocalTag.Name: cmd_data_tagid
LocalTag.Description: DO NOT CHANGE DATA IN THIS TAG TagID command

LocalTag.Name: cmd_data_fill
LocalTag.Description: DO NOT CHANGE DATA IN THIS TAG Fill command

LocalTag.Name: node_tempdataok
LocalTag.Description: Data sent to/received from the Gateway in the form of SINT

LocalTag.Name: k_blank_string_array
LocalTag.Description: Constant empty string array.

LocalTag.Name: temp_string_from_tag
LocalTag.Description: Temporary string array.

LocalTag.Name: blank
LocalTag.Description: DO NOT CHANGE DATA IN THIS TAG Blank SINT

LocalTag.Name: tagid_data_from_tag
LocalTag.Description: TagID from the RFID tag in SINT form.

LocalTag.Name: k_tag_data_blank
LocalTag.Description: DO NOT CHANGE DATA IN THIS TAG! Blank RFID_Cfg dataype tag.

LocalTag.Name: step_dly_tmr_02
LocalTag.Description: Step delay timer.

LocalTag.Name: k_blank_string
LocalTag.Description: DO NOT CHANGE DATA IN THIS TAG Empty string constant

LocalTag.Name: temp_data_string
LocalTag.Description: Temporary string used during data sort.

LocalTag.Name: temp_step_latch
LocalTag.Description: Latch used to delay sequencing by a logical scan.

LocalTag.Name: step_dly_tmr_03
LocalTag.Description: Step delay timer.

LocalTag.Name: step_dly_tmr_01
LocalTag.Description: Step delay timer.

LocalTag.Name: gwy_notification_codes
LocalTag.Description: Notification codes from the Gateway

LocalTag.Name: node_no_response_timer
LocalTag.Description: Timer used to detect no response.

LocalTag.Name: cmd_data_write
LocalTag.Description: DO NOT CHANGE DATA IN THIS TAG Write command

LocalTag.Name: aoi_data_sort_write_01
LocalTag.Description: Data sort AOI tag

LocalTag.Name: temp_rfid_data_write_sorted
LocalTag.Description: Sorted write data of RFID_Cfg datatype.

LocalTag.Name: temp_data_write_start
LocalTag.Description: Data item write start - used in data sorting.

LocalTag.Name: temp_data_write_length
LocalTag.Description: Data item write length - used in data sorting.

LocalTag.Name: k_empty_sint_array
LocalTag.Description: DO NOT CHANGE DATA IN THIS TAG Constant empty SINT array

LocalTag.Name: cfg_calc_full_blocks
LocalTag.Description: Calculated 188 blocks of data on tag.

LocalTag.Name: aoi_data_sort_write_02
LocalTag.Description: Data sort AOI tag

LocalTag.Name: element_list
LocalTag.Description: List of tag elements sorted from the config tag in order of byte location starting at 0.

LocalTag.Name: total_elements
LocalTag.Description: Total number of elements to read/write. Determined by sorting logic.

LocalTag.Name: temp_data_read_start
LocalTag.Description: Data item read start - used in data sorting.

LocalTag.Name: temp_data_read_length
LocalTag.Description: Data item read length - used in data sorting.

LocalTag.Name: aoi_data_sort_write_03
LocalTag.Description: Data sort AOI tag

LocalTag.Name: temp_rfid_sint_read_array
LocalTag.Description: Data read from RFID tag of the SINT form.

LocalTag.Name: temp_rfid_sint_write_array
LocalTag.Description: Data written to the RFID tag of the SINT form.

LocalTag.Name: step_mode
LocalTag.Description: Step mode bit

LocalTag.Name: step_next
LocalTag.Description: Next step bit.

LocalTag.Name: node_write_trx_dly_tmr
LocalTag.Description: Timer used to delay after data received to ensure data is in the tag.

LocalTag.Name: cmd_data_contr_status
LocalTag.Description: DO NOT CHANGE DATA IN THIS TAG Controller Status command

LocalTag.Name: cmd_data_tag_presence
LocalTag.Description: DO NOT CHANGE DATA IN THIS TAG Tag Presence command

LocalTag.Name: node_cmd_tag_presence
LocalTag.Description: tag presence command bit.

LocalTag.Name: tag_presence_results
LocalTag.Description: Data returned as a result of the tag presence command. See EMS documentation for details.

LocalTag.Name: controller_status_results
LocalTag.Description: Data returned as a result of the controller status command. See EMS documentation for details.

LocalTag.Name: node_cmd_controller_stat
LocalTag.Description: Controller Status command bit

LocalTag.Name: tmr_retry_controller_stat
LocalTag.Description: Wait interval after a failed controller status response.

LocalTag.Name: local_clear_fault
LocalTag.Description: Local clear fault bit. Used during controller status command to clear fault and re-issue command.

LocalTag.Name: aoi_data_sort_write_04
LocalTag.Description: Data sort AOI tag

LocalTag.Name: aoi_data_sort_write_05
LocalTag.Description: data sort aoi tag

LocalTag.Name: aoi_data_sort_write_06
LocalTag.Description: Data sort AOI tag

LocalTag.Name: ons_rfid
LocalTag.Description: general one shot dint
